About

My Superpowers

Empathy
Understanding the humans behind a product is what drew me to design, and what keeps me here. I research deeply and ask the uncomfortable questions. Team Work
I'm comfortable in rooms with engineers, product managers, enterprise clients, and executives. I've pitched decisions, facilitated workshops, and iterated in public.

Goal Focus
Getting things done motivates me. Never heard about it, but needs to be done? I’ll sit down, do some research and deliver the best result I can.

Areas of Active Investment

User Research & Testing
I've run end-to-end studies, including a bachelor's thesis on usability testing, and I'm deepening my practice in quantitative and continuous-discovery methods.


Motion & Interaction Design
Users love MOTION and it is pretty fun to make designs communicate this way. I’m not a pro, but played around with Lottie and Rive.

Things That Bring Me Joy

Rock Climbing | Pottery | Baking | Photography | Digital Art

Certifications

WCAG Auditing — Ministry of Digital Affairs

UX-PM Level 1 — UXalliance

English C2 Proficient — EF SET
